name: Laevatein, Generaider Boss of Shadows
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>影</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かげ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ジェネレイド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> レイヴァーテイン
desc:
2+ Level 9 monsters
You can only control 1 "Laevatein, Generaider Boss of Shadows". Monsters your opponent controls lose 1000 ATK/DEF. (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this Xyz Summoned card; Special Summon 1 non-Fairy "Generaider" Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck, then you can attach cards from any field and/or GYs to that Special Summoned monster, up to the number of materials this card had.

action: Attaches from your field as Xyz Material
Attaches from your opponent's field as Xyz Material
Attaches from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
Attaches from your opponent's Graveyard as Xyz Material
mst: Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
